text: <par>"Champhung, C Tangkhul, and N Tangkhul are really as different from Standard Tangkhul/Ukhrul as Huishu, Kachai, and Tusom" (David Mortensen, pc to dwbruhn, 7/16/12).</par>
<par>David Mortensen kindly provided this data and also normalized the transcription.</par>

Note the following correspondences between Brown's language names and the designations used in the STEDT database:Brown ~ STEDT
Kapwi ~ Rongmei / Nruanghmei
Southern Tangkhul ~ Sorbung
Luhuppa ~ Tangkhul (Standard)
